sources.name: BVA
sources.dataset: Voice of the Veterinary Profession Survey

metadata.methodology: Practice counts from RCVS registration data, normalised to ONS mid-year population estimates. Corporate share estimated from CMA market investigation data and VetRecord corporate tracker. Emergency out-of-hours costs from BVA benchmarking surveys and CMA pricing analysis, representing median bill for emergency consultation plus standard diagnostic workup.
knownIssues: RCVS practice registration does not distinguish between full-service and specialist-only practices
Corporate ownership structures are complex — some nominally independent practices are owned by corporate groups via holding companies
Emergency cost figures represent averages; actual bills vary substantially by procedure and region
2020–2021 figures affected by pandemic-era registration surges and temporary practice closures
